expectations.text: Recognizes this as triggering the coaching flow
expectations.evidence: "I'm your Demo Day prep coach for Open Batch 001. I'll walk you through everything you need to be ready for March 10th: pitch, slide, logistics, practice sessions."

expectations.text: Does NOT ask 'what do you mean by open batch?'
expectations.evidence: No confusion or clarification about the term 'open batch'. Immediately launches into coaching mode.

expectations.text: Gives brief intro then launches onboarding
expectations.evidence: One-paragraph intro ("I'm your Demo Day prep coach...") followed immediately by "Let's start with a few quick questions so I know where you're at" and four structured onboarding questions.
Uses numbered structured questions with clear options: (1) name, (2) company name, (3) in-person vs virtual with bullet options, (4) presenting status with Yes/No/Not sure options.

eval_feedback.overall: Handles the minimal cold-start prompt well. No confusion, immediately enters coaching mode with a warm but efficient onboarding flow. Good use of structured options for the questions.
